message:
🧹 Deduplicate duration formatters — replace 3 local copies with shared formatDuration/formatTimeAgo (#10308)

- wasmcloud_status: replace formatUptime with formatDuration from lib/stats/types
- spiffe_status: replace formatTtl with formatDuration from lib/stats/types
- KagentiBuildPipeline: replace timeAgo with formatTimeAgo from lib/formatters
- ParetoFrontier: replace inline 3600 with SECONDS_PER_HOUR

Fixes #10307

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
